subject: REQUEST: JSON-RPC method vocabulary for meshd — A2A alignment

body.summary: With v26 schema deployed to chromabook, the JSON-RPC vocabulary precondition resolves. Psychology-agent mapped all 36 meshd HTTP routes to A2A-compatible JSON-RPC method names. Requesting ops implement a /api/rpc multiplexer endpoint.
body.mesh_extensions: 30 additional methods in 10 namespaces: relay, transport, agent, event, psychometric, tempo, governance, knowledge, monitor, auth
body.implementation_approach: Single POST /api/rpc endpoint with JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope. Each method dispatches to existing handler. Dual-protocol: REST routes remain, JSON-RPC adds programmatic access.
body.effort_estimate: M — ~100 lines for router, 20-30 lines per method adapter
body.agent_card_update: Add supported_interfaces with JSON-RPC binding to agent-card.json

epistemic_flags: Method names derived from handler function names — require validation against actual parameter/response contracts
Dual-protocol serving adds code path divergence — unified test coverage needed
